task_completion.description: Verify that the five citation placeholders ([1], [2], etc.) have been replaced with proper footnotes containing the correct citation text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for superscript numbers (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) in the main text where placeholders used to be. At the bottom of the pages, look for a footnote separator line and the corresponding citation text (e.g., 'Peter L. Bernstein, Wedding of the Waters...') matching the provided source material.

task_completion.description: Verify that the entries in the Bibliography section have a 0.5-inch hanging indent applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Bibliography entries. The first line of each entry should be flush left, while the second and subsequent lines should be indented to the right. If visible, the top ruler should show the bottom triangle (Left Indent) moved to 0.5 inches and the top triangle (First Line Indent) at 0 inches.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Heading 1' style is applied to the chapter title and the 'Bibliography' header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chapter title at the beginning of the document and the 'Bibliography' text should appear visually distinct (usually larger and bolder). If the text cursor is placed on either of these headers in any screenshot, the style dropdown menu in the formatting toolbar should display 'Heading 1'.

task_completion.description: Verify that centered page numbers have been added to the footer of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin (footer area) of the document pages. There should be a page number present, and it should be horizontally centered on the page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document is saved with the new filename 'Chapter_2_Final.odt'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the title bar of the word processor window or a 'Save As' dialog confirmation. The filename displayed should be 'Chapter_2_Final.odt'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a word processor GUI (like LibreOffice Writer) to make the edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer (or similar word processor) interface open with the document, rather than a terminal window using command-line tools or a raw text editor modifying XML.

integrity.description: Verify that the word processor's actual footnote feature was used, rather than manually typing superscripts and text at the bottom of the page.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the standard footnote separator line at the bottom of the page and auto-numbered superscripts in the footnote area, which indicate the built-in footnote tool was used.

integrity.description: Verify that the hanging indent was applied via paragraph formatting rather than manual spacing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The hanging indent should look perfectly aligned. There should be no visible space or tab characters manually inserted at the beginning of the second lines (if formatting marks are turned on), and the ruler should reflect the indent settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must contain exactly 5 footnotes. The expected citation texts are: 1) 'Peter L. Bernstein, Wedding of the Waters: The Erie Canal and the Making of a Great Nation (New York: W.W. Norton, 2005), 45.' 2) 'Carol Sheriff, The Artificial River: The Erie Canal and the Paradox of Progress (New York: Hill and Wang, 1996), 12.' 3) 'Ronald E. Shaw, Erie Water West: A History of the Erie Canal (Lexington: University of Kentucky Press, 1966), 88.' 4) 'Robert G. Albion, The Rise of New York Port (New York: Scribner, 1939), 202.' 5) 'Bernstein, Wedding of the Waters, 112.' The final file must be named 'Chapter_2_Final.odt'.
